chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3099 of 2023 Roshan Ali Kanasro Versus Federation of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.14742/2023 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 07.08.2024 Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, Advocate for the petitioner. Syed Dilshad Hussain Shah, Special Prosecutor, NAB. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner has placed before us a memorandum that concerns with the deletion of the name of the petitioner from Exit Control List [ECL]. On such understanding, the petitioner’s counsel does not press this petition, as instructed. The petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
